steps.title: Map the logical relationship
steps.content: Sentence 1: many mushrooms contain phenolic compounds like cinnamic acid and catechin. Sentence 2: gives specific cases — cinnamic acid in one mushroom, catechin in another.

steps.title: Pick the matching transition
steps.content:
"For example" introduces a specific instance of the general claim — perfect fit. "For this reason" signals cause-effect; "However"/"Nevertheless" signal contrast.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
